creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jason Tubnor from comment #1)

It's uefi-edk2-bhyve-g20210226,2 and grub just comes on as EFI loader (equivalent to our loader.efi I assume).

The underlying storage is ahci-hd in this case with a raw disk.

The problem occurs when in grub typing ls -l (hd0,gpt2)/boot/ which never finishes the directory listing.
